title: Scope
full_text:
8.1.1.1 Scope
Scope
1) Compliance with this Code is permitted to be achieved by applying the
provisions of this Part in lieu of
  a) the prescriptive requirements in Sections 3.2., 4.2., 5.2., 6.2. and 7.2., or
  b) the trade-off provisions in Sections 3.3. and 4.3.
(See Note A-1.1.2.1.)

sentences.text: Compliance with this Code is permitted to be achieved by applying the provisions of this Part in lieu of

the trade-off provisions in Sections 3.3. and 4.3. (See Note A-1.1.2.1.)
